issues.title: Step 1 is a no-op (already implemented)
issues.attack: email_disconnect already redirects to settings_email at line 420. Plan instructs a change that's already done.
issues.response: Correct. Convert to verification step with regression test.

issues.title: Step 2 targets wrong view, introduces duplicate logic
issues.attack: settings_email (t13) already handles HTMX POST. Adding same to email_settings creates dead/competing code. request.htmx check too broad for legacy page.
issues.response: Correct. Remove Step 2 entirely. Legacy email_settings stays as-is.

issues.title: Verification plan too weak
issues.attack: No existing tests for email_disconnect or email_settings. Full suite passing is false positive.
issues.response: Add targeted tests for redirect target, backward compat, and HTMX partial.

issues.title: Duplicate save logic drift
issues.attack: email_settings saves filter_labels but settings_email does not. Divergence will grow.
issues.response: Valid but beyond t18 scope. Note discrepancy, test both paths.
